revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Canned_search here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Canned_search for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Side box
| metadata=no
| position = {{{position|}}}
| image    = [[File:Vector search icon.svg|30px|link=]]
|text=Search for '''''{{search link|"{{{1|{{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}}}}"}}''''' {{#if:{{{2|}}}
  |{{#if:{{{3|}}}
   |,
   | or
  }} '''''{{search link|"{{{2}}}"}}'''''
 }}{{#if:{{{3|}}}
  |{{#if:{{{4|}}}
   |,
   |, or
  }} '''''{{search link|"{{{3}}}"}}'''''
 }}{{#if:{{{4|}}}
  |{{#if:{{{5|}}}
   |,
   |, or
  }} '''''{{search link|"{{{4}}}"}}'''''
 }}{{#if:{{{5|}}}
  |, or '''''{{search link|"{{{5}}}"}}'''''
 }} on Wikipedia.
| class      = plainlinks selfreference
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
